ValidationRule.description: Name field to be non editable for Credit Card and Loan records
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( $Profile.Name != 'System Administrator', OR( ISPICKVAL(Source_System__c , 'FDR'), ISPICKVAL(Source_System__c , 'Megasys') ), Not(ISNEW()), AND(ISCHANGED(Name), Not(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Name)))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: User cannot update the Account Number
